goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Exactly two late toolbar names are stale. Rendered accessibility exposes Show inactive and archived and Group Pantry; exact checkbox/combobox role-name locators are the bounded fix.

worker_package.objective: Replace only the two stale toolbar locators with exact rendered role/name locators, then complete every independent gate.
verify: Replace Include inactive batches with exact checkbox Show inactive and archived, preserving check.
Replace Group inventory with exact combobox Group Pantry, preserving selectOption location; no other changes.
Run scoped format/lint and mirror hash equality.
Run fresh management through all active/inactive actions, search/group, three axe/overflow/screenshots, no browser errors.
Release port, fresh prepare, run integrated 400/350/50 flow with provenance/manual/intake/FEFO/history, two axe, five screenshots, no browser errors.
Inspect persistence read-only, run disposable migrate/dbcheck, release port, record diff/status integrity.
stop_if: Pre-hash differs or any change beyond two locators is required.
Either exact role/name locator fails uniqueness.
Workflows share state/database/server or either fails twice.

evidence: Inactive checkbox accessible name is Show inactive and archived.
Grouping combobox accessible name is Group Pantry.

parallel_safety.rationale: One mirror, DB, artifacts, and port require serial lifecycles.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
